excerpt: Facing failing grades and her ex-boyfriend moving on, a high-school senior goes from call girl to blackmailer to assassin.
title: Malibu High

excerpt: To retain her medical license, Kay Francis hatches a plot to catch Napoleon-obsessed public enemy Humphrey Bogart and his gang of crooks.
title: King of the Underworld

excerpt: A merciless Qing dynasty constable leads a dwindling squad to recover stolen gold and discovers, too late, that he has been descending into hell.
title: Killer Constable

excerpt: After the death of their imposing president, a company’s executives clash over who will assume control.
title: Executive Suite

excerpt: A composer staying at a villa to score a horror film suspects a killer when visitors begin disappearing.
title: A Blade in the Dark
